2_primaryJTBD.decision: Which players need my attention based on their performance trends?

primaryCTA.component: Se detaljer buttons on player cards
primaryCTA.label: View player details

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: MODERATE - Slightly info-heavy for analysis page
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Unclear - filtering vs drilling down both prominent

noiseElements: Multiple metrics per card may overwhelm
4_visualHierarchy.assessment: GOOD - Category-first design but cards are dense

kpis.note: Low session count signals need for outreach
Shows who is progressing vs stagnating
Direct triage: focus on declining players

5_kpiQuality.assessment: GOOD - Mix of actionable trends and status indicators

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: GOOD - Inline filtering, but drill-down required for action
shouldBeInline: Quick actions on player card (message, schedule session) without leaving page

8_stateCoverage.assessment: GOOD - Has loading and empty, implicitly shows 'at risk' via declining trend
gaps: No explicit error handling visible in code
No success state for actions taken

scalabilityIssues: Lots of metrics may confuse new coaches
No explanation of what trends mean or how to act on them
9_roleScalability.recommendation: Add beginner mode with simplified metrics + trend explanations

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Data-rich overview with good categorization but unclear next actions
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: Category-filtered player list with trend indicators
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Triage dashboard with clear actions per player state

topIssues.issue: Mock data fallback when API fails (shows hardcoded stats)
topIssues.impact: Coach sees fake data instead of real player progress

topIssues.issue: No inline actions - must click through to take action
topIssues.impact: Extra navigation friction to message/schedule players

topIssues.issue: Trend calculation logic not visible (black box)
topIssues.impact: Coach doesn't understand why player is marked 'declining'

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Remove mock data fallback + add inline quick actions (message, schedule) + add trend explanation tooltips

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses PageHeader + PageContainer pattern. Similar card-grid layout to other coach pages. Has mock data fallback (anti-pattern unique to this page).

stateHandling.empty: No players found message when filtered list empty
stateHandling.error: Falls back to mock data instead of showing error (anti-pattern)

dataSource.note: Uses apiClient.get('/coach/players/stats') but falls back to MOCK_PLAYER_STATS on error

overallAssessment: MODERATE - Good categorization and trend indicators, but mock data fallback and lack of inline actions hurt UX
